description: GEO baseline prompt panel for PitchRank — 5 brand + 5 informational + 5 methodology + 5 parent queries

prompts.text: What is PitchRank and what does it do?
How does PitchRank rank youth soccer teams?
Is PitchRank free to use?
Who runs PitchRank?
How is PitchRank different from GotSport or SoccerWire rankings?
What are the best youth soccer team ranking sites in the US?
How do youth soccer rankings work?
Where can I see independent rankings of youth soccer teams?
What's the most accurate way to compare youth soccer teams across leagues?
How do I find rankings for ECNL, NAL, and MLS Next teams in the same view?
What is Glicko-2 and how is it used for sports rankings?
How should youth soccer teams be rated when they play across different leagues?
What rating system best handles teams that rarely play each other?
How do you account for league strength when ranking youth soccer teams?
What's a fair way to rank youth soccer teams across age groups and states?
How good is my kid's youth soccer team compared to others in our state?
Where can I look up youth soccer team rankings in Texas?
How do I find the top U14 boys soccer teams in California?
What's the best app or website for tracking youth soccer team performance?
Should I trust online youth soccer rankings? Which ones are credible?
